column6: - add LEAF Si app so they function on CWL1 readers

- Existing 35-bit corp1000 prox cards. Have ~ 1,000 existing -3WS-CWL1 readers, but want to move to LEAF Enterprise. These will need to be updated to CPEN1 to function with new Lk10161 cards. We may add Kc1 of Lk00001 into the cards for CWL1 functionality, but want to try selling new readers first.
